response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video to identify vocal content. 2. Detected speech and instrumental background music but no vocal song performance throughout the entire duration. 3. Concluded that no vocal songs were present. 4. Mapped the video into two scenes based on visual/audio transitions and structured the JSON accordingly.
response.global_summary: The video features a birthday message and outfit reveal from the VTuber Ohashi to their fans, accompanied by instrumental background music. No vocal songs are performed.

scenes.description: The VTuber Ohashi waves and greets the audience at the start of their 2025 birthday stream.
A message to fans is displayed over an animated visual of the VTuber in a new outfit, set to instrumental background music.
